How to Apply
Content block block-countyoc-content

Body
Apply today!
Step 1.
Fill the application form (
English
,
Español
,
Tiếng việt
) or call us at
1 (888) 968-7942
/
1 (888) YOUR-WIC
to schedule an appointment or walk into
any of the clinics
.
Step 2.
You will receive a call within 24hrs to process your application.
